title: derris trifoliata
intro: Derris trifoliata, also known as the three-leafed derris or stink bean, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Asia and Africa. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, primarily due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions. Derris trifoliata can be prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, making it a valuable component in traditional medicine.
